title: centella longifolia
intro: Centella longifolia, also known as Indian pennywort or Gotu Kola, is a perennial plant native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, prized for its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centella longifolia include improved cognitive function, enhanced wound healing, and reduced stress levels, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Centella longifolia can be found in supplements, teas, and topical creams, and are often used to support overall well-being and promote skin health.
